_meta.notes: Phase-2 elemental BoQ structure modelled on the reference .xls files (Bungalow / Pad / Raft / Pile). Preambles are descriptive context shown above an item group. `splitByLevel: true` causes the exporter to expand matching items into one row per distinct level (floor-by-floor). Rates come from each item.rate as saved in the BoQ view — there are no hard-coded rates here.

elements.heading: EXCAVATION, FILLING, ETC OTHER THAN BULK
elements.preamble: Excavation in compacted earth maximum depth not exceeding 2m deep inclusive of removing surplus material from site, earthwork support and keeping the works free of water.

items.description: Surplus material from excavations and/or stock piles on site
Sides of trench and hole excavations exceeding 2m deep
G2 Sub base layer under surface beds average thickness exceeding 2m

elements.heading: COMPACTION
elements.preamble: Compaction of ground surface under floors etc including scarifying for a depth of 150mm and recompacting to 95% Mod-AASHTO density.

items.description: Compaction of ground surface under floors etc including scarifying

elements.heading: SOIL POISONING
elements.preamble: Apply soil insecticide to under floors including forming and poisoning shallow trenches around perimeter of buildings as required.

items.description: Apply soil treatment to under floors

elements.heading: UNREINFORCED CONCRETE CAST AGAINST EXCAVATED SURFACES
elements.preamble: 10MPa / 19mm aggregate concrete cast against earth or unblinded sand.

items.description: Surface blinding against earth and unblinded sand

elements.heading: REINFORCED CONCRETE
elements.preamble: 25MPa / 19mm concrete in foundations and ground slabs, including curing.

items.description: Surface slabs and steps cast in panels on waterproofing

elements.heading: FORMWORK
elements.preamble: Sawn plain formwork, basic finish, struck after 7 days.

items.description: Edges, risers and ends not exceeding 300mm high or wide

elements.heading: REINFORCEMENT
elements.preamble: BRC fabric reinforcement to BS 4483, lapped and tied to specification.

elements.heading: DAMP-PROOFING
elements.preamble: 1000 gauge Visqueen DPM laid over hardcore with 150mm laps sealed with proprietary tape.

elements.heading: BLOCKWORK IN FOUNDATION
elements.preamble: Sandcrete hollow blockwork bedded and jointed in cement and sand mortar (1:6) and reinforced with 25mm × 1mm hoop iron in alternate courses.

elements.heading: WALLS — REINFORCED CONCRETE
elements.preamble: 25MPa / 19mm concrete in lintels over openings, fully cured.

elements.heading: WALLS — FORMWORK
elements.preamble: Fair-faced formwork to sides and soffits of lintels, struck after 7 days.

elements.heading: WALLS — REINFORCEMENT
elements.preamble: Reinforcement bars; B.S. 4449, hot rolled high yield steel; bent and fixed in lintels.

elements.heading: WALLS — BLOCKWORK
elements.preamble: Sandcrete hollow blockwork bedded and jointed in cement and sand mortar (1:6) including reinforcement and movement joints to specification.

items.description: Sandcrete hollow blockwork in wall, generally internal and external

elements.heading: ROOF COVERING AND MEMBERS
elements.preamble: Pre-painted profiled steel roof sheets fixed to hardwood members with proprietary fixings as specification.

elements.heading: WINDOWS AND DOORS
elements.preamble: Aluminium and timber units complete with all ironmongery, glazing where applicable, and hung on standard hinges per manufacturer's instructions.

items.description: Aluminium casement windows complete with fly screen
Wooden panel doors complete with frame and ironmongery

elements.heading: FLOOR, WALL AND CEILING FINISHES
elements.preamble: Tiled / screeded floors, plastered and painted walls, P.O.P or board ceilings to architect's specification.

elements.heading: D20: EXCAVATING AND FILLING
elements.preamble: Bulk excavation in compacted earth, including disposal off site, earthwork support and keeping the works free of water.

items.description: Excavation to column bases; maximum depth not exceeding 2.00m
Earthwork support; maximum depth not exceeding 2.00m
Allow for keeping excavation free of water — Ground water
Allow for keeping excavation free of water — Surface water

elements.heading: EARTH FILLING, ETC.
elements.preamble: Earth filling and laterite filling to make up levels, deposited in 250mm maximum thickness layers and compacted.

items.description: Laterite filling to make up levels

elements.heading: COMPACTION & TREATMENT

items.description: Compacting and levelling bottom of excavations

elements.preamble: BRC mesh and Visqueen DPM under floor slab.

elements.heading: BLOCKWORK & DPC
elements.preamble: Sandcrete hollow blockwork bedded and jointed in cement / sand mortar (1:6); horizontal damp proof course over.

elements.heading: EXCAVATION, FILLING, ETC. OTHER THAN BULK
elements.preamble: Excavation for ground beams and raft slab, with carting away, earthwork support, and keeping the works free of water.

items.description: Extra over for carting away surplus material
Sides of trench and hole excavations exceeding 2m deep
